prompt: A professional and dynamic background for a visa service. A photorealistic, dark blue passport lies open at an angle in the lower-left, showing a page with a shimmering, gold foil visa stamp. A sleek, modern white airplane with gold accents appears to fly out from behind the passport, its wingtip dramatically crossing into the foreground. A large, semi-transparent frosted glass (glassmorphic) panel cuts diagonally across the composition from top-left to bottom-right. The main background is a deep blue (#3b82f6) to white gradient with subtle, ghosted world map patterns. Soft, ambient lighting from the top right highlights the edges of the airplane and passport, giving a premium feel.
description:
Create an AMAZING, UNIQUE social media background.

CREATIVE VISION: A multi-layered, dimensional design titled 'The Glassmorphic Portal'. The background features a deep blue and gold gradient mesh, creating a soft, ethereal atmosphere. A highly realistic, 3D passport is positioned asymmetrically, open to a page with a shimmering, gold-foil visa stamp. A large, frosted glass (glassmorphic) panel is placed diagonally across the center, acting as the main content area. A sleek, white and gold airplane appears to be flying *out* from behind the passport, with its wingtip dynamically breaking the plane and overlapping the edge of the glassmorphic panel, creating a stunning 3D effect. The contact information is neatly arranged on this translucent panel, with blurred background elements visible through it.
MOOD: Premium, Dynamic, Sophisticated, Global
COLORS: #3b82f6, #ffffff, #f5c94c
BACKGROUND STYLE: A deep gradient mesh blending from royal blue (#3b82f6) to navy (#1e3a8a) with warm golden light flares (#ffd700).

Make this background STUNNING and UNIQUE:
- NOT a boring solid color or simple gradient
- Add visual DEPTH and INTEREST
- Consider: abstract shapes, light rays, bokeh, particles, textures, patterns
- Make it look like a $10,000 design agency created it
- The background should COMPLEMENT the layered layout style

TECHNICAL:
- 1080x1080 pixels, 8K quality
- Keep some areas clear for text
- No text, no watermarks, no faces
- Premium, polished finish
